summary: Tested image upload preview fix in Products Manager. All features working correctly: Image preview shows IMMEDIATELY when file is selected using URL.createObjectURL(), file info (name, size) displayed in green success box, URL input disabled when file selected, URL input preview also works.

issues: Some products show '$NaN' for price due to inconsistent price format in database (pre-existing issue from iteration_13)

critical_code_review_comments: Image preview fix implemented correctly using URL.createObjectURL()
handleFileSelect function properly creates preview URL immediately on file selection
Image src priority chain correct: imagePreview || editForm.image || product.image
Green success box with file info provides good UX feedback
URL input correctly disabled when file is selected to prevent confusion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image upload preview bug is FIXED. When editing a product and selecting a file, the image preview now shows immediately using URL.createObjectURL(). File info (name, size) displays in green success box. URL input is disabled when file is selected. All inline editing features continue to work correctly.

details: URL.createObjectURL() creates blob URL for preview
Preview image src changes to blob: URL immediately
No need to click Save to see preview
Green success box with checkmark visible
URL input disabled when file is selected
URL input preview works when entering image URL
Entering URL clears file selection (via code logic)
imagePreview (blob URL) takes priority when file selected
editForm.image (URL input) used when no file selected

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Images not showing when uploaded in Products Manager inline editing
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added imagePreview state and handleFileSelect function using URL.createObjectURL()
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Image preview now shows immediately when file is selected
